title: Glow Lichen to Deepslate Diamond Ore
description: do you ever see glow lichen in a cave and think it is diamonds? well this resource pack makes it 100 times worse!
body:
Ever ran in a cave thinking you found diamond, only to realize it’s just stupid glow lichen? Well, this resource pack cranks that disappointment up to maximum pain. Now glow lichen looks exactly like deepslate diamonds — leaving you questioning your life choices, and why you even downloaded this stupid pack. It’s the perfect way to prank yourself and your friends. Too da loo cave divers!

(Icon made by THEroninMINECRAFT)
